File name: docs/software-evaluation/icon-vs-churchtrac-comparison.md. Type of document: Comparison template. Purpose: Compare IconCMO and ChurchTrac using confirmed vendor information.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Which vendor details can be confirmed from official materials or demos?. File name: docs/software-evaluation/demo-scorecard.md. Type of document: Demo scorecard. Purpose: Provide 1-5 scoring tool and demo questions.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Who attends demos and how should category weights be set?. File name: docs/software-evaluation/implementation-plan.md. Type of document: Implementation plan. Purpose: Outline phases for requirements, selection, setup, migration, training, go-live, and review.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: What timeline, data migration scope, and training plan are realistic?. File name: docs/communications/leadership-review-packet.md. Type of document: Leadership review packet. Purpose: Summarize situation, diagnosis, structure, committee decisions, church approval questions, roadmap, and risks.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Which leaders should review before committee action or church communication?. File name: docs/communications/finance-committee-packet.md. Type of document: Committee review packet. Purpose: Provide Finance Committee with situation summary, decision areas, software/reimbursement/spending/card/budget questions, and monthly review rhythm.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Pastor, Deacons. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Which decisions should Finance Committee make before Personnel finalizes role and hiring materials?. File name: docs/communications/finance-committee-recommendation.md. Type of document: Communication draft. Purpose: Draft a Finance Committee recommendation format.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: What actual recommendation will Finance make?. File name: docs/communications/personnel-committee-packet.md. Type of document: Committee review packet. Purpose: Provide Personnel Committee with situation summary, role split, authorized paid Bookkeeper materials, Finance request, and discussion questions.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: What parts should be approved before posting or using hiring materials?. File name: docs/communications/personnel-committee-recommendation.md. Type of document: Communication draft. Purpose: Request that Finance Committee provide direction on software, spending, reimbursement, card use, review, budget impact, and role division before Personnel finalizes hiring materials.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Has Personnel Committee approved sending this to Finance Committee?. File name: docs/communications/deacon-update.md. Type of document: Communication draft. Purpose: Provide a short update format for Deacons.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Deacons, Pastor. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: What decision or counsel is being requested from Deacons?. File name: docs/communications/church-business-meeting-summary.md. Type of document: Communication draft. Purpose: Provide calm plain-language summary for congregation if needed.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Congregation. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: When should this be presented and what motions, if any, accompany it?.
